nasb.text: For we will surely die and are like water spilled on the ground which cannot be gathered up again. Yet God does not take away life, but plans ways so that the banished one will not be cast out from him.

esv.text: We must all die; we are like water spilled on the ground, which cannot be gathered up again. But God will not take away life, and he devises means so that the banished one will not remain an outcast.

cnv.text: 我們都是必死的，像水潑在地上不能收回來一樣；但　神並不取去人的命，反而設法使逃亡的人不致永遠離開他逃亡。

ccb.text: 人都难免一死，就像覆水难收。然而，上帝不是要夺取人的性命，而是要设法使流亡的人重新回来。
